summary: The page has a perfect performance score, with all metrics meeting the recommended thresholds. No significant performance issues were found.

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted.
findings.evidence: LCP: 1.5 s mobile / 0.4 s desktop; budget 2.5 s

findings.title: First Contentful Paint
findings.description: First Contentful Paint marks the time at which the first text or image is painted.
findings.evidence: FCP: 1.1 s mobile / 0.2 s desktop; budget 2.0 s

findings.title: Cumulative Layout Shift
findings.description: Cumulative Layout Shift measures the movement of visible elements within the viewport.

findings.title: Total Blocking Time
findings.description: Sum of all time periods between FCP and Time to Interactive, when task length exceeded 50ms.
findings.evidence: TBT: 0 ms mobile / 0 ms desktop; budget 200 ms

findings.title: Use efficient cache lifetimes
findings.description: A long cache lifetime can speed up repeat visits to your page.
